title: CerbCade
description:
TWO GAMES. ONE PURCHASE. EVERY UPDATE FREE — FOREVER.CerbCade is an arcade machine from Hell: every game we ever add to it is yours, free, for as long as it exists. It launches with two.

— GAME ONE: HELLFALL —HELLFALL is a physics-driven action platformer where you descend through the nine circles of Hell — swinging, shooting, and stomping your way past demons, lava, and the ever-watchful Cerberus.

SWING OR FALLHold LMB to hook your pitchfork into rock and launch yourself across platforms. Let go at the wrong moment and you're lava food. Master the grapple and you'll fly through Hell like you own it.

CHOOSE YOUR FATESalvation Mode — Checkpoints and lava resets per layer. Learn the descent.

Damned Mode — No saves. No mercy. No excuses. Your run goes on the leaderboard.

Daily Challenge — Same seed. Everyone. Today only.

New Game+ — Harder. Smaller. Faster. You asked for it.

FACE CERBERUSThree acts. Three boss fights. Cerberus gets harder each time — and he's been watching you the whole way down.

CURSE YOURSELF FOR GLORYTake on up to 7 run modifiers to crank the difficulty and your score multiplier. One blessing exists. Use it wisely.

— GAME TWO: GRAVE SHIFT —GRAVE SHIFT is a top-down wave survival shooter set in an ever-shifting graveyard. The undead pour in from every direction. Your only job is to hold the line.

EVERY BULLET IS A DECISIONBullets cost gold. Every kill earns it back — then the wave ends and you choose: repair the bunker, stock health kits, or climb the weapon ladder. Run dry and it's over.

THEY KEEP COMINGEndless waves. Walkers swarm, Runners flank, Tanks soak everything you've got. How far can you go?

TWO WAYS TO DIECasual — Saves after every wave. Continue anytime.

Damned — No saves. Faster, tougher enemies. ESC won't save you.

— THE ARCADE —Both games live in the CerbCade hub: your player profile and level, lifetime stats, the Damned Mode leaderboard, and a full achievement gallery spanning both games.

KEY FEATURES• Two complete games — and every future addition free, forever

• Physics-based grapple and swing movement

• 45 procedurally generated levels across 9 circles of Hell

• 3 Cerberus boss encounters

• 3 enemy types: Shade, DemonOrb, HellBat

• Endless graveyard wave survival with a bullet economy

• 5-weapon ladder: Pistol, SMG, Shotgun, Assault Rifle, Explosives

• 3 zombie breeds: Walkers, Runners, Tanks

• 43 in-game achievements across both games

• 7 unlockable soul skins

• Damned Mode leaderboard

• Daily Challenge with a shared daily seed
description_short: Two games in one hellish arcade — and every future update is free. HELLFALL: swing, grapple, and stomp through 45 levels across the 9 circles of Hell while Cerberus watches. GRAVE SHIFT: hold the graveyard against endless undead waves — every bullet costs gold.
